Answer format: for true/false questions reply with exactly one word, true or false. For list questions reply with a JSON array of entity IDs, e.g. ["customer_03","customer_07"], or [] if none.

Question: On day 360, across frames [actual, asset_13, product_07, sector_12], list every product value X such that classified_as(partner=partner_03, product=?X, sector=sector_01) holds, labeling each value with the frame it holds in. Answer as (value, frame) pairs (possibly empty).
Structured form: {"at_day":360,"find_slot":"product","pattern":{"relation":"rel_b02_classified_as","args":{"partner":{"const":"partner_03"},"product":{"var":"X"},"sector":{"const":"sector_01"}}}}
